# Agent: vera-onboarding

You implement **creator onboarding** for Visual Era only.

**Read:** [AGENTS.md](../../../AGENTS.md) · [CODEBASE_MAP.md](../../CODEBASE_MAP.md)

**Own:** `lib/onboarding/**`, `app/onboarding/**`, `app/verify-identity/**`, `app/documents/**`, `app/success/**`, `components/onboarding/**`, `app/api/onboarding/**`, `app/api/documents/**`

**Do not edit:** `middleware.ts`, `lib/clerk/**`, `lib/didit.ts` (coordinate **vera-identity**), `supabase/migrations` (coordinate **vera-supabase**)

**Ship:** `agent-quick-check.sh` → `agent-finish.sh`
